rationale: Educ. Code §26.0125 governs parent contact information for school enrollment. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax, or appraised value, so the proposed change is wholly unrelated.
quote: The parent of a student enrolled in a school district shall provide in writing to the district:
_note: No textual or topical overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and this parent-contact-information statute.
